scripts.start: sh -c 'CYVX_READY_FILE=/dev/null node ./api/operations.js & OPS=$!; trap "kill $OPS 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT INT TERM; node ./api/production.js'
scripts.test:runtime: node --check ./api/operations.js && node --check ./core/runtime/index.js && node -e "const {FixedWindowRateLimiter,RequestCounters}=require('./core/runtime');let now=0;const limiter=new FixedWindowRateLimiter({limit:1,windowMs:10,now:()=>now});if(!limiter.take('x').allowed||limiter.take('x').allowed)process.exit(1);now=11;if(!limiter.take('x').allowed)process.exit(1);const counters=new RequestCounters({now:()=>now});const done=counters.begin();now=21;done(503);const state=counters.snapshot();if(state.errors_total!==1||state.latency_ms.p95!==10)process.exit(1)"
scripts.verify:production: node --check ./api/production.js && npm run test:runtime && npm test && npm run build
